Event: Tavern of Fortune - May 2025
Event Date: 29/05/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: W32
Mana Courier Wand

Once in a while the unit and 3 random allied units are healed for 160000 (+bonus of spell power) and have their damage, health, physical and magic armor increased by 30% for 3 sec. The targets also gain a shield that blocks 372000 of any damage. The shield lasts up to 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 4 sec
